name: Web - URL Enumeration / Content Discovery
description: Detects automated content discovery and URL enumeration attacks. A single IP generating many 404 errors in a short period indicates tools like gobuster, ffuf, dirbuster, or wfuzz scanning for hidden files, admin panels, and backup files.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) status=404 | bucket _time span=2m | stats count as not_found_count, dc(uri) as unique_uris, values(uri) as sample_uris, values(useragent) as agents by src_ip, host, _time | where not_found_count >= 50 | eval severity=case( not_found_count >= 500, "high", not_found_count >= 200, "medium", 1==1, "low") | eval attack_type="URL/Directory Enumeration" | eval mitre="T1595.003" | eval sensitive_hit=if(match(mvjoin(sample_uris," "), "(admin|backup|\.git|\.env|config|wp-admin|phpmyadmin|shell|\.bak|\.sql)"), "YES", "NO") | sort -not_found_count | table _time, src_ip, host, not_found_count, unique_uris, sensitive_hit, agents, attack_type, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
